amend-address-1.required: Enter address line 1, typically the building and street
amend-address-1.maxlength: Address line 1 must be between 2 and 250 characters

amend-address-2.maxlength: Address line 2 must be between 2 and 250 characters

amend-town-or-city.maxlength: Town or city must be between 2 and 250 characters
